languages.text: "Невольно? Слабость — это выбор, Ваша Светлость. Каждый день, в который ты решил пожалеть себя, ты подарил Архиврагу. Вам может быть их сколько угодно жаль, но все они уже мишень для наших лазганов".

"Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."
languages.original_text: "Невольно? Слабость — это выбор, Ваша Светлость. Каждый день, в который ты решил пожалеть себя, ты подарил Архиврагу. Вам может быть их сколько угодно жаль, но все они уже мишень для наших лазганов".

traits.locale_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

"Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

"Well, who is to blame for that? Heartless bureaucrats, lying priests spewing Commissar words, lowlife officers, and stuck-up aristocrats. Why don't we put them all up against the wall? To save the souls of billions? Freedom for the one, all of it."

"Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

"Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

languages.text: 「では、その責任は誰にあるのか？冷酷な官僚、嘘を吐く神職、卑劣な軍人、傲慢な貴族。彼らを全員壁際に立てて、何十億もの魂を救うべきではないか？一人を解放するなら、全てを解放する」
languages.original_text: "Well, who is to blame for that? Heartless bureaucrats, lying priests spewing Commissar words, lowlife officers, and stuck-up aristocrats. Why don't we put them all up against the wall? To save the souls of billions? Freedom for the one, all of it."

languages.text: "Farkında olmadan mı? Zayıflık bir seçimdir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kendinize acımayı seçtiğiniz her gün, Şerbaşı'na armağan edilmiş bir gündür. Onlara istediğiniz kadar acıyın ama artık silazerlerimiz için birer hedeften başka bir şey değiller."
languages.original_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

traits.locale_text: "Farkında olmadan mı? Zayıflık bir seçimdir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kendinize acımayı seçtiğiniz her gün, Şerbaşı'na armağan edilmiş bir gündür. Onlara istediğiniz kadar acıyın ama artık silazerlerimiz için birer hedeften başka bir şey değiller."

languages.text: “不知不觉？软弱是一种选择，大人。纵容自己自怜的每一天，就是送给混沌大敌的一份大礼。您可以同情他们，可眼下在我们的激光枪面前，他们就只是靶子。”
languages.original_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

traits.locale_text: “不知不觉？软弱是一种选择，大人。纵容自己自怜的每一天，就是送给混沌大敌的一份大礼。您可以同情他们，可眼下在我们的激光枪面前，他们就只是靶子。”

languages.text: "Unwissentlich?" Schwäche ist eine Entscheidung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. "Jeder Tag, an dem Ihr Euch selbst bemitleidet, ist ein Geschenk für den Erzfeind. Ihr könnt sie gerne bemitleiden, aber sie sind nichts weiter als Ziele für unsere Lasergewehre."
languages.original_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

traits.locale_text: "Unwissentlich?" Schwäche ist eine Entscheidung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Jeder Tag, an dem Ihr Euch selbst bemitleidet, ist ein Geschenk für den Erzfeind. Ihr könnt sie gerne bemitleiden, aber sie sind nichts weiter als Ziele für unsere Lasergewehre."

languages.text: « Sans le savoir ? La faiblesse est un choix, Votre Seigneurie. Chaque jour passé à s'apitoyer est une journée offerte au Grand Ennemi. Vous avez beau avoir pitié d'eux, ce ne sont que des cibles pour nos fusils laser. »
languages.original_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

traits.locale_text: « Sans le savoir ? La faiblesse est un choix, Votre Seigneurie. Chaque jour passé à s'apitoyer est une journée offerte au Grand Ennemi. Vous avez beau avoir pitié d'eux, ce ne sont que des cibles pour nos fusils laser. »

languages.text: «¿Inconscientemente? La debilidad es una elección, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cada día que uno decide lamentarse es un día regalado al Archienemigo. Puede compadecerlos, pero ahora ya no son más que objetivos para nuestros rifles láser».
languages.original_text: "Unwittingly? Weakness is a choice, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Every day you choose to pity yourself is a day gifted to the Archenemy. Pity them all you want, but they are nothing more than targets for our lasguns now."

traits.locale_text: «¿Inconscientemente? La debilidad es una elección, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cada día que uno decide lamentarse es un día regalado al Archienemigo. Puede compadecerlos, pero ahora ya no son más que objetivos para nuestros rifles láser».
